title: Dominator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dominator''' can refer to multiple subjects:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Dominator (Harrower-class)|'''''Dominator''''']], a [[Harrower-class dreadnought|''Harrower''-class dreadnought]] used by the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*[[Dominator (Galactic Republic)|'''''Dominator''''']], a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*[[Dominator (Imperial-class)|'''''Dominator''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Dominator (Interdictor-class)|'''''Dominator''''']], an [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the Galactic Empire
*[[Dominator (Victory-class)|'''''Dominator''''']], a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the Galactic Empire
*'''[[Dominator landspeeder]]''', a type of [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]
**'''[[Dominator AV]]''', a modified Dominator landspeeder with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] turret
*'''[[Dominator gauntlets]]''', a type of [[Glove/Legends|gauntlet]]

{{Disambig}}
